multiple_choice.instruction: Write the letter of the correct definition

options.B: one part of a situation or subject
options.C: a group of things of the same kind

items.definition: one part of a situation or subject

true_false.instruction: True or False? Write T or F.

items.statement: This sentence is correct: "She has never tried sushi before."
items.explanation: 'Never' with present perfect is correct for describing life experiences up to now.

items.statement: This sentence is correct: "I have seen that movie three times."
items.explanation: Present perfect is correct for repeated actions at an unspecified time.

short_answer.instruction: Read the question. Write your answer (max 3 words or a number).
short_answer.question: Fill in the blank: "She ___ (live) in London since 2019."
